# SRC010 - Consumer Heterogeneity and Paid Search Effectiveness

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Section | Measurement |
| Authors / source | Blake, Nosko & Tadelis |
| Year | 2014/2015 |
| Source type | Large field experiment |
| Quality | High |
| URL | [https://www.nber.org/papers/w20171](https://www.nber.org/papers/w20171) |

## Bias / limitation

eBay context; transfer carefully.

## Core takeaway

Paid search returns can be far below non-experimental estimates because clicks correlate with intent.

## How the marketing agent should use it

Use to prevent last-click worship and branded-search cannibalization.

## Tactics unlocked

- Convert source insight into a campaign hypothesis.
- Translate the hypothesis into one ad angle, one landing-page proof section, and one measurement plan.
- Record whether the tactic worked in `memory/tactic_performance.md`.

## Agent instruction

When this source is relevant, write one sentence explaining **why this source applies to the buyer state** before using it.
